{{Quote|You organics are so fragile.|MED-47 unit|audio=Yourorganics.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>}}
The '''MED-47''' was a model of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. Many of their qualities were incorporated into the later [[ADK-25-MED medical droid]]s. The droids often replied to their commander with "sedatives are not an option", "[[Torture/Legends|torture]], or repair?", as well as "you organics are so fragile," indicating their enjoyment of painful operations.

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], MED-47s served alongside their ADK-25-MED counterparts, especially in scenarios the Trade Federation focused in. Years after the war, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] used their shells for suicidal explosive droids-ironic, considering their original purpose as healers.

==Behind the scenes==
Like all the medical droids used by the "bad guys" in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', the MED-47 has a sadistic love of torturous surgery.

This droid cannot be normally be built during gameplay, as the Trade Federation uses droids and has no need for medical droids. It only appears in "scenario design" and during certain missions where organics such as [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] appear.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
